title: Purpose Limitation
description: Data usage restricted to specified goals.

title: DDP
description: Protocol for data delivery between agencies.

title: DDS
description: Specification for data to be delivered.

title: Summons
description: Order to appear before a court.

title: Revision
description: Controlled update of a formal document.

title: PIA
description: Check for privacy risks within a system.

title: Consent
description: Free and explicit expression of will.

title: Special Category
description: Sensitive data like race or religion.

title: Access Management
description: Process of identity and rights control.

title: Right to Rectify
description: Right to correct inaccurate personal data.

title: Right of Access
description: Right to view one's own data.

title: Right to Erase
description: Right to have personal data deleted.

title: Processor
description: Party handling data for a controller.

title: Metadata
description: Data providing context about other data.

title: Ontology
description: Model of concepts and their relations.

title: URI
description: Unique identifier for a digital resource.

title: Core Data
description: Critical data points for a domain.

title: Gateway
description: Entry point for managed API traffic.

title: Streaming
description: Continuous flow of live data events.

title: Quality
description: Extent to which data meets needs.

title: OIDC
description: Identity layer on top of OAuth 2.0.

title: Trust
description: Level of confidence in the network.
